steps.description: Press the F1 key to open the command palette in Visual Studio Code, while viewing the "Preview README.md" document and Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit notifications.
Type 'Debug: Select and Start Debugging' into the VS Code Command Palette input field at the top of the window.
Press Enter to select "Debug: Select and Start Debugging" from the command palette dropdown in Visual Studio Code.
Type 'Debug in Teams (Chrome)' into the VS Code Run and Debug launch configuration dropdown at the top center of the window.
Press Enter to select "Debug in Teams (Chrome)" from the launch configuration dropdown in Visual Studio Code.
Click on the browser tab labeled "Sign in to your account" at coordinates (296, 20) to focus or close the tab. The page displays the Microsoft account password entry screen.
Type the text 'https://dev.teams.microsoft.com' into the Chrome browser's address bar at the top of the Google homepage interface.
Press the "Enter" key to open the highlighted URL "https://dev.teams.microsoft.com" in the Chrome address bar.
Click inside the "Email or phone" input field on the Microsoft Sign-in page at coordinates (374, 345).
Type the text: '${{env:M365_ACCOUNT_NAME}}' into the email input field on the Microsoft login page (URL: login.microsoftonline.com), displayed within a browser interface showing the "Sign in" screen.
Press the "Enter" key to activate the "Next" button on the Microsoft login page, where the email input field has been filled with "test001@atktesting05.onmicrosoft.com."
Click on the "Password" input field within the Microsoft login page to focus and enable text entry.
Type text: '${{secret:M365_ACCOUNT_PASSWORD}}' into the password input field on the Microsoft login page, which prompts the user to "Enter password" for the account displayed.
Press the "Enter" key to submit the password in the Microsoft login interface, focusing on the "Sign in" button below the password text field.
Click the "Yes" button on the "Stay signed in?" prompt in the Microsoft login interface.
